enumValues.name: LARGE
enumValues.description: Large image preview suitable for detail views. (1024x1024)

enumValues.name: MEDIUM
enumValues.description: Medium image preview typically suitable for listings and detail views. (300x300)

enumValues.name: MEDIUM_LARGE
enumValues.description: Medium-to-large image preview suitable for listings and detail views. (768x0)

enumValues.name: THUMBNAIL
enumValues.description: Small image preview suitable for thumbnails and listings. (150x150)
